Off Calendar Jul-11-2011 Continued To Aug-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-24-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ivy McCray for and with Jake Sasser, Jr.

Ms. McCray provided an endorsed copy of the Proof of Service, stated that notice of the petition went out on April 5th, that she just served the immediate Beneficiaries of the trust and will, that Sye Mayes is mentioned in the will but not a Beneficiary, that he has received notice by other means and that he is not part of the Decedent's A-Trust. The Court stated that the Declaration signed by Jake Sasser states that Sye Mayes received notice. Ms. McCray stated that he was notified on May 3rd by telephone and by mailing. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Continued To May-24-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
